title: DFU - Software Update Page - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: Verify that disconnecting and reconnecting earbuds during a DFU process shows and persists the "Update currently not available" popup for both right and left earbuds.
steps: Navigate to the Software Update page.
Verify that the popup "Update currently not available, please try back later" appears.
Confirm that the popup persists after reconnection.
Repeat the same sequence with the left earbud (disconnect left earbud, verify popup, reconnect, confirm popup persists, dismiss).
expected: The popup "Update currently not available, please try back later" appears when either earbud is disconnected during a DFU process, and persists after reconnection until dismissed.
